title: Organized Debating
desc: No matter the kind of debate, we provide a structured environment for members to engage in intellectual discourse and refine their arguments. BP, AP, WSDC, and other formats are welcome.

title: Public Dialogue
desc: Lots of people have opinions, but few have the tools to express them. We provide a platform for members to share their ideas and engage in meaningful conversations on social, economic, and political issues.

title: Systemic Analysis
desc: In a world of diverse perspectives, we equip members with the tools to analyze complex beliefs, recognize patterns, truths, and avoid biases and fallacies that prevent clear thinking and understanding.
